settings.heading: Custom Acrylic Trophies & Awards in India
settings.subheading: Lightweight, crystal-clear acrylic trophies with full-colour UV printing and laser engraving — ideal for corporate events, sports days and high-volume orders shipped anywhere in India.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Meru Trophy makes custom acrylic trophies and awards with full-colour UV printing and engraving, starting around ₹250. Acrylic is lighter and more affordable than crystal — perfect for bulk orders and shipped events. Made in Bangalore, delivered pan-India. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: Clear, light and budget-friendly
settings.text: Acrylic gives you the clean, transparent look of glass at a fraction of the weight and cost. It takes full-colour UV printing beautifully, so logos, photos and gradients reproduce vividly — and it's shatter-resistant, which makes it the safest choice for shipping large quantities. Choose from shapes, colours, stands and thicknesses, all custom-cut and engraved with names, logos and dates.

settings.title: Full-colour UV printing
settings.text: Vivid logos, photos and gradients printed directly onto the acrylic.

settings.title: Lightweight & shatter-resistant
settings.text: Safer and cheaper to ship in bulk than glass or crystal.

settings.title: Custom shapes & colours
settings.text: Cut to any shape, with clear, frosted or coloured acrylic options.

settings.title: Free engraving
settings.text: Names, titles and dates engraved at no extra design charge.

settings.question: Acrylic vs crystal — which is cheaper?
settings.answer: Acrylic is noticeably cheaper and lighter; crystal looks more premium. For high-volume or shipped events, acrylic wins on cost and safety; for senior/VIP awards, crystal feels more prestigious.

settings.question: Can you print our logo in full colour?
settings.answer: Yes — UV printing reproduces full-colour logos, photos and gradients directly on the acrylic, plus optional engraving.

settings.question: Is there a minimum order?
settings.answer: No minimum. Per-piece pricing drops from 25 units and again at 100+.

settings.question: Do you deliver outside Bangalore?
settings.answer: Yes — pan-India from our Bangalore workshop, with international shipping available.

settings.heading: Need acrylic trophies for an event?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, quantity and date — we'll send designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
